segments.text: First listen and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: What is Debbie going to try to do?
Debbie Hart is going to swim across the English channel tomorrow.

translations.zh-Hans: 黛比·哈特明天准备游过英吉利海峡。

segments.text: She is going to set out from the French coast at five o'clock in the morning.

translations.zh-Hans: 她准备清晨五点从法国海岸出发。

segments.text: Debbie is only 11 years old and she hopes to set up a new world record.

translations.zh-Hans: 黛比只有11岁，她希望创下一项新的世界纪录。

segments.text: She is a strong swimmer and many people feel that she is sure to succeed.

translations.zh-Hans: 她游泳很棒，许多人认为她一定会成功。

segments.text: Debbie's father will set out with her in a small boat.

translations.zh-Hans: 黛比的父亲将乘一条小船和她一起出发。

segments.text: Hart has trained his daughter for years.

translations.zh-Hans: 先生训练女儿已经多年。

segments.text: Tomorrow he will be watching her anxiously as she swims the long distance to England.

translations.zh-Hans: 明天，当她长途游向英国时，他将焦急地注视着她。

segments.text: Debbie intends to take short rests every two hours.

translations.zh-Hans: 黛比打算每两小时短暂休息一次。

segments.text: She will have something to drink but she will not eat any solid food.

translations.zh-Hans: 她会喝些东西，但不吃任何固体食物。

segments.text: Most of Debbie's school friends will be waiting for her on the English coast.

translations.zh-Hans: 黛比的大多数同学将在英国海岸等候她。

segments.text: Among them will be Debbie's mother, who swam the channel herself when she was a girl.

translations.zh-Hans: 其中还有黛比的母亲，她年轻时也曾游过英吉利海峡。
